narrative:
Westlake-01-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 974 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
